use_cases: Displaying real-time order status and delivery progress to customers in e-commerce applications
Creating engaging product tracking experiences with 3D interactive elements on hover
Showing estimated delivery times with visual progress indicators
Providing shipment tracking with responsive parallax effects
Enhancing customer trust through transparent order status communication
ai_summary: An interactive order tracking card component featuring 3D parallax effects that respond to mouse movement. The card displays order information including status, product details, and ETA with a multi-step progress indicator. Built with Framer Motion for smooth spring-based animations and transforms, creating an engaging tracking experience suitable for e-commerce platforms.
